---
title: "method of compartment"
author: "MJY"
date: "2026-04-17"
output: html_document
---

################################################################################ 

# 

# OUTLINES:

# Analyze compartment switching and visualize proportions

# 

################################################################################ 

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(readr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(purrr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(pheatmap))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library("readxl"))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(data.table))

# =========================
# Set input directory
# =========================
input_dir <- "F:/share/results/compartment/bedgraph"

# List all PCA bedgraph files
file_list <- list.files(input_dir, pattern = "_pca.bedgraph$", full.names = TRUE)

# =========================
# Load bin file (reference regions)
# =========================
bin_file <- "F:/share/results/compartment/bedgraph/bin_200000_PC1.xlsx"
bins <- read_excel(bin_file)

# Create unique region ID (chr:start-end)
bins$region_id <- apply(bins, 1, function(x) paste(x[1], x[2], x[3], sep = ":"))

# =========================
# Load and align PC1 scores across samples
# =========================
score_data <- list()

for (file in file_list) {
  # Read bedgraph file
  data <- fread(file, header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  # Create region ID
  data$region_id <- apply(data, 1, function(x) paste(x[1], x[2], x[3], sep = ":"))
  
  # Align with reference bins
  aligned_data <- merge(bins, data, by = "region_id", all.x = TRUE)
  
  # Keep NA values
  aligned_data$score[is.na(aligned_data$score)] <- NA
  
  # Store score vector
  score_data[[basename(file)]] <- aligned_data$score
}

# Combine all scores into a matrix
score_matrix <- do.call(cbind, score_data)
colnames(score_matrix) <- names(score_data)
rownames(score_matrix) <- aligned_data$region_id

# Remove rows with NA
score_matrix <- score_matrix[complete.cases(score_matrix), ]

# =========================
# Identify compartment switching regions
# =========================
combinations <- list(
  c("con_6w_pca.bedgraph", "ccl4_6w_pca.bedgraph"),
  c("con_10w_pca.bedgraph", "ccl4_10w_pca.bedgraph"),
  c("con_18w_pca.bedgraph", "ccl4_18w_pca.bedgraph")
)

selected_rows <- rep(FALSE, nrow(score_matrix))

for (pair in combinations) {
  col1 <- which(colnames(score_matrix) == pair[1])
  col2 <- which(colnames(score_matrix) == pair[2])
  
  # Define switching as sign change in PC1
  condition <- (score_matrix[, col1] > 0 & score_matrix[, col2] < 0) | 
               (score_matrix[, col1] < 0 & score_matrix[, col2] > 0)
  
  selected_rows <- selected_rows | condition
}

# Extract switching regions
score_matrix_select <- score_matrix[selected_rows, ]
score_matrix_select <- score_matrix_select[,c(6,3,4,1,5,2)]

# Filter chrX regions
filtered_data <- score_matrix_select[grep("^chrX:", rownames(score_matrix_select)), ]
filtered_data <- filtered_data[,c(6,3,4,1,5,2)]

# =========================
# Classify A/B compartments
# =========================
classify_compartment <- function(value) {
  if (!is.na(value)) {
    if (value > 0) {
      return("A")
    } else {
      return("B")
    }
  } else {
    return(NA)
  }
}

score_matrix_df <- data.frame(score_matrix)

score_matrix_AB_df <- as.data.frame(
  lapply(score_matrix_df, function(x) sapply(x, classify_compartment))
)

# =========================
# Define transition categories (AA, BB, AB, BA)
# =========================
classify_pair <- function(col1, col2) {
  if (col1 == "A" & col2 == "A") return("AA")
  else if (col1 == "B" & col2 == "B") return("BB")
  else if (col1 == "A" & col2 == "B") return("AB")
  else if (col1 == "B" & col2 == "A") return("BA")
  else return("NA")
}

comparison_pairs <- list(
  c("con_6w_pca.bedgraph", "ccl4_6w_pca.bedgraph"),
  c("con_10w_pca.bedgraph", "ccl4_10w_pca.bedgraph"),
  c("con_18w_pca.bedgraph", "ccl4_18w_pca.bedgraph")
)

for (pair in comparison_pairs) {
  col1 <- pair[1]
  col2 <- pair[2]
  
  # Apply pair classification
  score_matrix_AB_df[[paste0(col1, "_", col2)]] <- mapply(
    classify_pair,
    score_matrix_AB_df[[col1]],
    score_matrix_AB_df[[col2]]
  )
}

# Remove suffix from column names
score_matrix_AB_df <- rename_with(score_matrix_AB_df, 
                                  ~ gsub("_pca.bedgraph", "", .x), 
                                  contains("_pca.bedgraph"))

score_matrix_AB_df <- score_matrix_AB_df[,7:9]

# =========================
# Calculate proportions
# =========================
proportions <- lapply(score_matrix_AB_df, function(col) {
  counts <- table(col, useNA = "no")
  proportions <- counts / sum(counts)
  return(proportions)
})

proportions_df <- do.call(rbind, proportions)
rownames(proportions_df) <- colnames(score_matrix_AB_df)

# =========================
# Convert to long format
# =========================
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

proportions_df <- as.data.frame(proportions_df)
proportions_df <- proportions_df[,c(1,3,2,4)]

score_matrix_combinations_long <- proportions_df %>%
  mutate(Combination = rownames(.)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Combination, names_to = "Category", values_to = "Proportion") %>%
  group_by(Combination) %>%
  mutate(percentage = Proportion / sum(Proportion) * 100)

# Add prefix to labels
score_matrix_combinations_long$Combination <- paste0("HiTC_", score_matrix_combinations_long$Combination)

score_matrix_combinations_long

# =========================
# Set factor order
# =========================
score_matrix_combinations_long$Category <- factor(
  score_matrix_combinations_long$Category, 
  levels=c('AA', 'BA', 'AB','BB')
)

# =========================
# Plot stacked bar (with labels)
# =========================

ggplot(score_matrix_combinations_long, aes(x = Combination, y = percentage, fill = Category)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(percentage, 1), "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)) + 
  labs(y = "percentage") +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("HiTC_con_6w_ccl4_6w", "HiTC_con_10w_ccl4_10w", "HiTC_con_18w_ccl4_18w")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("AA" = "#F67F7F", "BA" = "#EA3E3E", "AB" = "#6170B9", "BB" = "#9DA3C8")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(vjust=1, size=15, face = "bold", angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank()
  )


```
